---
name: P0 task protocol
about: Create an auditable, acceptance-oriented implementation task
title: "[TASK] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Task identity

- Task or capability ID:
- Title:
- Responsible role:
- Target branch:
- Baseline commit:

## Scope

- Allowed directories/files:
- Dependent contract version and owner:
- Explicit non-goals:

## Acceptance

- Business acceptance:
- Permission scenarios:
- Exception scenarios:
- Regression scope:
- Performance or real-data requirement:

## Constraints

- Files or policies that must not change:
- Forbidden operations:
- Data, secret, network, and external-system limits:

## Completion handoff

- Self-test evidence:
- Required independent-test evidence:
- Documentation updates:
- Defect status:
- Report location and handoff notes:
